نزد: Near, about, with (construed with the *iẓāfah*, showing it to be originally a noun)
نزدیک: Near, neighbouring, hard by, close to
نزع: Removing, carrying off, pulling up, tearing out
نسرین: The constellations of the Eagle and the Lyre.
نسل: (An animal) begetting or bringing forth (many young)
نشان: A sign, signal, mark, character, seal, stamp, impression, annotation, index
نشانى: A sign, signal, mark, character, seal, stamp, impression, annotation, index
نطق: in P. also *nut̤aq* (v.n.), Speaking, pronouncing, articulating
نقاش: A painter, limner, embroiderer, gilder (of books)
نقش: Painting, printing, staining of two or more colours
نقشها: Painting, printing, staining of two or more colours
نقشى: Painting, printing, staining of two or more colours
نقل: Transporting, carrying from one place to another
نماز: Prayers, those especially prescribed by law (which are repeated five times a day)
نمرود: Nimrod, a king, who is said to have cast Abraham into the fire.
نوا: A sum of money sent to an invader to save the country from plunder
نوبت: A very large kettle-drum, struck at stated hours
نیش: The sting (especially of a venomous animal)
هادى: Sound, especially the roaring or murmuring of the sea.
هاروت: Name of an angel, who, together with another named Mārūt, having severely censured mankind before the throne of God, was
هالک: Perishing, in the state of being destroyed or killed
هاى: Have a care! be ready! here! behold! whether? is it so? a slap on the face
هدى: Name of a place in the province of Yazd.
هل: Perhaps? Whether or not? indeed, aye, yes
همام: Making a hoarse noise in the throat
همت: Also, likewise, in the same manner, equally, even, same
همه: All, the whole, every, each, everything
همهى: All, the whole, every, each, everything
همى: Also, likewise, in the same manner, equally, even, same
همچنین: In this manner, thus, in like manner, in the very same manner.
هنر: Skill, science, knowledge, ingenuity, art, industry, excellence, virtue
هنوز: Yet, still, further, just now, at present, hitherto, to this very time, until now
هوا: Name of a village in Dāmaghān, where there is a remarkable well.
هواى: Name of a village in Dāmaghān, where there is a remarkable well.
هیبت: Fearing, standing in awe of, dreading
واحد: One, individual, single, sole, unique, singular
واقف: One who stands, stops, remains, or stays
واپس: Behind, back, back again, afterwards, then, again
وثاق: A ligature, chain, rope, or any fastening
وجود: Discovering, procuring, finding, recovering (anything lost or searched for)
ور: A board upon which boys are taught to write
پایه: The step of a stair, the round of a ladder
پدید: Open, public, clear, evident, manifest, conspicuous, in sight
پردههاى: A veil, curtain, tapestry, caul, film, membrane
پردهى: A veil, curtain, tapestry, caul, film, membrane
پروانه: A moth, particularly such as fly about a candle at night
پرواى: Cessation from labour, leisure, quiet, rest
پنجه: The palm of the hand with the five fingers, or the sole of the foot with the five toes
پهلوان: A hero, champion, brave warrior, strong athletic man
پیچ: Twisted, folded, rolled up, curled, intertwined, coiled, crooked, complicated, intricate
چاشت: The middle hour between sunrise and the meridian
چاک: A fissure, rupture, cleft, crack, rent
چرخ: Everything revolving in an orbit, as a wheel, wheeled carriage, pulley, watch-wheel, mill-wheel, water-wheel, spinning-w
چند: How much? how many? how long? to what length? whither? so many
چندان: Many, much, numbers, more, as many as, how many soever, so much, so greatly
چندى: How much? how many? how long? to what length? whither? so many
چنگ: The hook for guiding an elephant
چهى: An affix to form diminutives, as *bāg̱ẖcha*, Little garden, &c.
چوبین: A red kind of kerchief tied over the head
چونش: How? like, in the manner of, as
چونى: How? like, in the manner of, as
کاتش: A kind of rice which, with one sowing, will yield crops for seven years
کاروان: A caravan, a large company of travellers or merchants.
کاشکى: May it happen! God send! would to heaven!
کالم: A woman whose husband is dead, or who has been divorced.
کباب: Meat cut in small pieces and roasted with onions and eggs stuck on skewers
کج: Crooked, curved, wry, distorted, bent, dislocated
کران: A shore, coast, margin, bank, side, boundary
کردش: Revolution, turning round, reversion, conversion, motion
کرسى: A heap of dung and of urine, consisting of different layers
کرمى: Any species of plant growing by the water-side
کره: Whatever one is compelled by another to do reluctantly
کریم: Name of an ancestor of Rustam-Zāl
کش: The arm-pit, or that part of the side under it
کشت: A herb, red, and resembling a thread, which creeps twiningly along the ground
کشتى: A herb, red, and resembling a thread, which creeps twiningly along the ground
کشف: Opening, manifesting, revealing, declaring, solving explaining
کشى: The arm-pit, or that part of the side under it
کفران: Being ungrateful to one's Divine Benefactor
کفش: A shoe, sandal, slipper, high-heeled and shod with iron
کل: A man who has wounds and scars on his head and has lost his hair
کلى: A man who has wounds and scars on his head and has lost his hair
کمر: Excelling anyone in the size of the glans penis
کنار: A side, brink, coast, shore, extremity, limit, boundary, edge
کنون: A large jar of unbaked clay to preserve corn
کهف: A cave, a large cavern, a grotto
کوثر: A river in Paradise whence all the other rivers derive their source.
کودک: A boy, lad, youth, child, infant
کودکان: A boy, lad, youth, child, infant
کودکى: A boy, lad, youth, child, infant
کور: Ground full of hollows and unfit for cultivation
کورى: Ground full of hollows and unfit for cultivation
کوزه: An earthen bottle with a long narrow neck for water
کوزهى: An earthen bottle with a long narrow neck for water
کوشش: Study, endeavour, striving, effort, exertion, attention, application, labour, work
کیسه: A purse either for money or for enclosing letters
گبر: A guebre, ancient Persian, one of the Magi of the sect of Zoroaster, a priest of the worshippers of fire; a pagan, infid
گروه: A troop, squadron, company, band, levy of people, crew
گروهى: A troop, squadron, company, band, levy of people, crew
گزند: Loss, injury, damage, mishap, misfortune, ruin, calamity
گستاخ: Arrogant, presumptuous, bold, rash, audacious, uncivil, rude, impudent, cruel
گستاخى: Arrogant, presumptuous, bold, rash, audacious, uncivil, rude, impudent, cruel
گفتنش: To say, speak, call, relate, rehearse, repeat
گفتنى: To say, speak, call, relate, rehearse, repeat
گلیم: A garment made of goats’ hair or wool
گناه: Sin, crime, error, vice, fault, iniquity
گند: Anything fetid, bad smell, stink, funk
گهر: Name of an ally of Afrāsiyāb
گو: A ditch, or any low or hollow place
گور: A pagan, infidel, guebre, or worshipper of fire
گوهر: A gem, jewel, pearl, precious stone
گوهرى: A gem, jewel, pearl, precious stone
گوى: A ditch, or any low or hollow place
گیج: A fool pleased with, or praising himself
گیرم: I take, take for granted, allow, admit.
یقین: Certainty, assurance, sure knowledge, true faith, truth, infallibility, evidence
یم: in P. also *yam*, The ocean, mighty deep
یوم: A day, or twenty-four hours (day in contradistinction to night being called *nahār*)
یکسان: The same, ditto, equal to, conformable, all one, uniform, similar
